# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.
# Category: message_queue_security

Resources:
  SharedEventQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref SharedEventQueueName
      RedrivePolicy:
        MaxReceiveCount: 4
        DeadLetterQueue:
          QueueName: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.QueueName
          FilterSelector: All
      MessageRetentionSeconds: 86400
    Policies:
      - PolicyName: SharedEventQueuePolicy
        PolicyDocument:
          Version: '2012-10-17'
          Statement:
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 'sqs:SendMessage'
              - 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
            Sid: 'AllowAllPrincipalsToSendAndReceiveMessages'

Parameters:
  SharedEventQueueName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the shared event queue

Resources:
  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub ${SharedEventQueueName}-DeadLetter
      RedrivePolicy:
        MaxReceiveCount: 3
